query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- LED202 Lesson 2: Developing Your Leadership Vision (480012)
(480012, 'A leadership vision provides:', 'multiple_choice', '["Confusion","Direction and purpose for the future","Limitations","Status quo"]', 'Direction and purpose for the future', 1),
(480012, 'Proverbs 29:18 states that without vision:', 'multiple_choice', '["People prosper","People perish or cast off restraint","Nothing changes","Leaders succeed"]', 'People perish or cast off restraint', 2),
(480012, 'Vision should be rooted in:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal ambition only","Gods purposes and calling","Popular trends","Financial goals"]', 'Gods purposes and calling', 3),
(480012, 'Communicating vision effectively requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Complexity","Clarity, repetition, and passion","Secrecy","Vagueness"]', 'Clarity, repetition, and passion', 4),
(480012, 'Vision casting involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Forcing compliance","Inspiring others to embrace the vision","Manipulation","Coercion"]', 'Inspiring others to embrace the vision', 5),
(480012, 'A vision statement should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Long and complex","Clear, compelling, and memorable","Vague","Constantly changing"]', 'Clear, compelling, and memorable', 6),
(480012, 'Vision is refined through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Isolation","Prayer, counsel, and feedback","Stubbornness","Ignoring others"]', 'Prayer, counsel, and feedback', 7),
(480012, 'Leaders must align their actions with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Popular opinion","The stated vision","Personal convenience","Past traditions only"]', 'The stated vision', 8),
(480012, 'Vision leaks means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Vision is permanent","Vision must be regularly reinforced","Vision is unimportant","Vision is automatic"]', 'Vision must be regularly reinforced', 9),
(480012, 'Nehemiah demonstrated vision by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Giving up","Rallying people to rebuild Jerusalems walls","Ignoring the problem","Working alone"]', 'Rallying people to rebuild Jerusalems walls', 10),
(480012, 'Explain the importance of vision in leadership and how to develop and communicate it effectively.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Vision provides direction, must be rooted in Gods purposes, and requires clear, passionate communication to inspire others.', 11),

-- LED202 Lesson 3: Building and Leading Teams (480013)
(480013, 'Effective teams are characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Competition among members","Unity, trust, and shared purpose","Individualism","Conflict avoidance"]', 'Unity, trust, and shared purpose', 1),
(480013, 'Jesus built His team by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Hiring professionals","Calling ordinary people and investing in them","Working alone","Avoiding relationships"]', 'Calling ordinary people and investing in them', 2),
(480013, 'Team diversity is valuable because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It creates conflict","Different gifts and perspectives strengthen the team","Uniformity is better","It is unnecessary"]', 'Different gifts and perspectives strengthen the team', 3),
(480013, 'Delegation involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Dumping tasks","Entrusting responsibility with appropriate authority","Micromanaging","Avoiding accountability"]', 'Entrusting responsibility with appropriate authority', 4),
(480013, 'Trust in teams is built through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Suspicion","Consistency, honesty, and vulnerability","Control","Secrecy"]', 'Consistency, honesty, and vulnerability', 5),
(480013, 'Healthy conflict in teams:', 'multiple_choice', '["Should be avoided","Can lead to better decisions when managed well","Is always destructive","Indicates failure"]', 'Can lead to better decisions when managed well', 6),
(480013, 'Team members need:', 'multiple_choice', '["Criticism only","Clear roles, expectations, and appreciation","Ambiguity","Isolation"]', 'Clear roles, expectations, and appreciation', 7),
(480013, 'Empowering team members means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Controlling everything","Giving authority and supporting their growth","Abandoning them","Limiting their potential"]', 'Giving authority and supporting their growth', 8),
(480013, 'Team meetings should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoided","Purposeful, efficient, and participatory","Endless","One-way communication"]', 'Purposeful, efficient, and participatory', 9),
(480013, 'Celebrating team wins:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is unnecessary","Builds morale and reinforces values","Is prideful","Should be private"]', 'Builds morale and reinforces values', 10),
(480013, 'Describe the principles of building and leading effective ministry teams.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Effective teams require shared vision, trust, clear roles, empowerment, healthy communication, and celebration of wins.', 11);
